svg.title: Customer Support AI Ticket Tool — Full Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end agentic pipeline from ticket ingestion through AI agents to Streamlit UI with analytics, export, and compliance layers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about ticket input methods')
sendPrompt('How does CSV upload work?')
sendPrompt('What synthetic data is generated?')
sendPrompt('How does live API ingestion work?')
sendPrompt('What does the Preprocessor Agent do?')
g.text: Anonymize PII · clean text · extract metadata

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is GDPR compliance handled?')
sendPrompt('How does the Classifier Agent work?')
sendPrompt('How does Priority Scoring work?')
sendPrompt('How is emotion and urgency detected?')
sendPrompt('How does the Response Drafter generate replies?')
sendPrompt('What does the Quality Checker agent do?')
sendPrompt('Describe the ticket input panel in Streamlit')
sendPrompt('How are results shown — category, confidence, priority?')
sendPrompt('How does the draft response panel work with manual override?')
sendPrompt('What analytics are shown in the dashboard tab?')
sendPrompt('What is shown in the agent reasoning trace?')
g.text: Agent reasoning trace — step-by-step pipeline log (expandable)
Shows each agent's input · output · confidence in real time

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does churn risk scoring work?')
sendPrompt('What does sentiment heatmap look like in batch mode?')
sendPrompt('How does the SLA timer and urgency clock work?')
sendPrompt('How are similar past tickets retrieved?')
sendPrompt('How does the handling time reduction metric work?')
sendPrompt('What export formats are supported?')
sendPrompt('How does CSV export work for batch tickets?')
sendPrompt('How does Zendesk ticketing system integration work?')
sendPrompt('What success metrics are tracked?')
